---
title: "Talisman, The by Sir Walter Scott, preface by CMY, edited by Dwight Holbrook"
---

## Talisman, The by Sir Walter Scott, preface by CMY, edited by Dwight Holbrook

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1886
**Genre:** Non-fiction: criticism
**Format:** Preface to book

**Publisher:** Boston: Ginn & Co.

### Notes

Like <i>Quentin Durward</i>, this appeared in Ginn’s ‘Classics for Children’ series.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
